movesList.name: Dark Spell - Destruction
movesList.notes: Can be used in air, goes to Liberation, if Dark Spell MAX is at 3

movesList.name: Dark Spell - Creation
movesList.notes: Can be used in air, goes to Liberation, if Dark Spell MAX is at 3

movesList.name: Dimension Fang
movesList.notes: can be repeated on 2nd move before Input-less Dark Spell or Liberation occurs

movesList.name: > Dash Cancel
movesList.input: 4 4 or 6 6 or P P or 4 + P P before Dark Spell or Liberation occurs

movesList.name: > Spell Cancel
movesList.input: Any special moves before Dark Spell or Liberation occurs

movesList.name: > Dark Spell - Destruction (Input-less)
movesList.notes: from N/ 6 Dimension Fang, goes to Liberation, if Dark Spell MAX is at 3, No Input

movesList.name: > Dark Spell - Creation (Input-less)
movesList.notes: from 4 Dimension Fang, goes to Liberation, if Dark Spell MAX is at 3, No Input

movesList.name: Chaos Ripper
